name: core objective gate closes resolved foreground objective after consequence

source.purpose: Core SF2 should use the objective close/reframe gate without SF2B experiment mode once the foreground objective has landed with enough chapter consequence.

thread_spine.title: Clear the checkpoint
thread_spine.resolutionCriteria: Deliver the sealed cargo to the checkpoint clerk and receive clearance.
thread_spine.failureMode: The checkpoint locks the corridor and marks the ship.
thread_spine.retrievalCue: checkpoint clearance, sealed cargo, corridor gate

input.playerInput: Set the cargo in the clerk's cradle and take the clearance.

narrator.prose: The clerk's cradle seals around the crate and the checkpoint light turns green.

transitions.reason: The sealed cargo was delivered to the checkpoint clerk and clearance was received.

narratorMessages.playerInput: What does the clearance cost now?
